contents:
[package]
name = "aiscript"
version = "0.1.0"
edition = "2024"

[dependencies.aiscript-v0]
path = "../aiscript-v0"

[dependencies.aiscript-v1]
path = "../aiscript-v1"

[dev-dependencies.tokio]
version = "1"
features = ["rt-multi-thread"]

[package]
name = "aiscript-v0"
version = "0.1.0"
edition = "2024"

[dependencies]
chrono = "0.4"
futures = "0.3"
indexmap = "2.3"
peg = "0.8"
percent-encoding = "2.3"
rand = "0.10"
regex = "1.10"
thiserror = "2.0"
unicode-segmentation = "1.11"

[dependencies.serde]
version = "1.0"
features = ["derive"]

[dependencies.serde_json]
version = "1.0"
features = ["preserve_order"]

[dependencies.tokio]
version = "1"
features = ["macros", "rt", "sync", "time"]

[dependencies.uuid]
version = "1.10"
features = ["v4"]

[dev-dependencies]
rustyline = "18.0"

[dev-dependencies.tokio]
version = "1"
features = ["rt-multi-thread"]

[package]
name = "aiscript-v1"
version = "0.1.0"
edition = "2024"

[dependencies]
chrono = "0.4"
futures = "0.3"
indexmap = "2.3"
nom = "8.0"
nom_locate = "5.0"
percent-encoding = "2.3"
rand = "0.10"
regex = "1.10"
sha2 = "0.11"
thiserror = "2.0"
unicode-segmentation = "1.11"

[dependencies.chacha20]
version = "0.10"
features = ["legacy"]

[dependencies.serde]
version = "1.0"
features = ["derive"]

[dependencies.serde_json]
version = "1.0"
features = ["preserve_order"]

[dependencies.tokio]
version = "1"
features = ["macros", "rt", "sync", "time"]

[dependencies.uuid]
version = "1.10"
features = ["v4"]

[dev-dependencies]
paste = "1.0"
rustyline = "18.0"

[dev-dependencies.tokio]
version = "1"
features = ["rt-multi-thread"]
